title: collaborator_public_list
description: Verify that GET /api/collaborator/public returns only approved and visible collaborators with correct response structure and caching.

title: collaborator_registration_happy_path
description: Test POST /api/collaborator with valid FormData containing all required fields (companyName, email, primaryPhoneNumber, industrialSector, specialization). Expect 201 response with success message.

title: collaborator_registration_duplicate_email
description: Register a collaborator, then attempt to register again with the same email. Expect 400 with code 'EMAIL_EXISTS'.

title: collaborator_registration_duplicate_phone
description: Register a collaborator, then attempt to register again with the same phone number. Expect 400 with code 'PHONE_EXISTS'.

title: collaborator_registration_validation_missing_fields
description: Send POST /api/collaborator with empty FormData (no required fields). Expect 400 validation error response.

title: collaborator_registration_invalid_email
description: Send POST /api/collaborator with invalid email format (e.g., 'not-an-email'). Expect 400 validation error.

title: collaborator_registration_invalid_phone
description: Send POST /api/collaborator with invalid phone format (missing + prefix). Expect 400 validation error.

title: innovator_public_list
description: Verify that GET /api/innovators/public returns only approved and visible innovators with correct response structure.

title: innovator_registration_happy_path
description: Test POST /api/innovators with valid FormData for all required fields (name, email, phoneNumber, country, city, specialization, projectTitle, projectDescription). Expect 201.

title: innovator_registration_duplicate_email
description: Register an innovator, then attempt to register again with the same email. Expect 400 with code 'EMAIL_EXISTS'.

title: innovator_registration_duplicate_phone
description: Register an innovator, then attempt to register with the same phone. Expect 400 with code 'PHONE_EXISTS'.

title: innovator_registration_validation_missing_fields
description: Send POST /api/innovators with empty FormData. Expect 400 validation error.

title: innovator_registration_max_length_violations
description: Send POST /api/innovators with city > 100 chars and specialization > 200 chars. Expect 400 validation error.

title: innovator_registration_project_description_too_long
description: Send POST /api/innovators with projectDescription > 1000 chars. Expect 400 validation error.

title: innovator_registration_invalid_stage_development
description: Send POST /api/innovators with an invalid stageDevelopment value. Expect 400 validation error.

title: collaborator_registration_xss_injection
description: Send POST /api/collaborator with XSS payload '<script>alert(1)</script>' in companyName field. Verify the value is stored or rejected, but does NOT execute.

title: innovator_registration_sql_injection
description: Send POST /api/innovators with SQL injection payload in name field. Verify Prisma parameterized queries prevent any injection.

title: collaborator_registration_arabic_unicode
description: Send POST /api/collaborator with Arabic text (الشركة العربية) in companyName and location fields. Expect 201 successful creation with correct Unicode storage.
